---
title: "Now"
---

*What I'm working on at the moment. Last updated 16 July 2026.*

::: {.lead-block}
Writing up three first-author manuscripts from my PhD, ahead of first submission and
preprint:

- *The structure of developmental noise in a complete connectome*
- *Spatial transcriptomics of the larval mushroom body: intrinsic pre-tuning of memory-circuit neurons*
- *Towards the panconnectome*
:::

::: {.lead-block}
Finishing a transitional postdoc in the Cardona group at the MRC Laboratory of
Molecular Biology, and moving to London in September 2026.
:::

<!-- Add or edit freely — a "now" page is meant to be a living snapshot. -->

[This is a [now page](https://nownownow.com/about); a snapshot of my current focus rather than a record.]{.muted}
